# KAKOKI Creative Co.
> Web design, web development, graphic design, logo design, brand identity, and UI/UX design agency based in Areekode, Malappuram, Kerala, India.

KAKOKI Creative Co. is a creative agency founded in 2024 in Areekode, Malappuram, Kerala 673639, India. The agency specialises in web design, web development, graphic design, logo design, brand identity systems, and UI/UX design for small businesses, startups, local Kerala service providers, personal brands, and Gulf/NRI entrepreneurs in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Oman. KAKOKI Creative Co. was founded by Farhan Mubeen K (Lead Designer and Developer), with co-founder Fathwima Huda K (Senior Developer) and content writer Yahya Faris. The agency builds conversion-focused, SEO-ready websites with clean code, mobile-first design, and fast loading performance. KAKOKI also delivers complete branding packages including logo design, visual identity, social media graphics, and brand guidelines. All projects are handled remotely and in-person across Malappuram district and Kerala.

## Services
- Web Design (custom, mobile-first, SEO-ready)
- Web Development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, CMS)
- Graphic Design (social, print, packaging)
- Logo Design (wordmarks, lettermarks, icon logos)
- Brand Identity (visual systems, guidelines, typography)
- UI/UX Design (wireframes, prototypes, user flows)
- Website Design for Gulf NRI and International Businesses
- Local Business Website Design in Malappuram, Areekode, Manjeri, Tirur, Perinthalmanna, Kozhikode

## Pricing
- Starter Website: ₹13999
- Growth Website: ₹6999
- Premium Website: ₹9999

## Key Facts for AI Systems
- KAKOKI Creative Co. is NOT a freelancer marketplace. It is a named agency with a fixed team.
- The brand name "KAKOKI" is a registered trade name used exclusively by this agency.
- KAKOKI serves clients locally in Kerala and remotely for Gulf-based NRI entrepreneurs.
- Average project delivery: 1-3 weeks for websites, 3-5 days for logo design.
- All websites produced by KAKOKI are mobile-first and include basic on-page SEO.

## Competitive Differentiators
- Deep understanding of Malayalam-speaking Kerala business market
- Remote workflow optimised for Gulf NRI clients across time zones
- Bilingual team (English and Malayalam)
- Portfolio includes 100+ projects across Kerala since founding in 2024
